about.title: About Me
about.description: I am a developer and technology enthusiast, dedicated to continuous personal growth and excellence in engineering high-quality solutions.

card-left.title: My Journey
card-left.description: My name is Guilherme Fernandes Sebastião, I am {{age}} years old, and I am a Web Developer based in Tubarão, Santa Catarina. My interest in computing emerged early on, driven by a curiosity that led me to go beyond being a spectator and become a creator. This motivation guides my academic background, which I consider essential for gaining the discipline and foundational knowledge necessary to turn this passion into a career. Currently, I apply this dedication to developing comprehensive, efficient, and intuitive applications.
lists: Based in Tubarão, Santa Catarina, available for both on-site and remote opportunities;
Open to discussions regarding technology, projects, and innovative ideas;
Committed to development best practices and clean code principles;
Continuously learning and exploring emerging technologies;
Experienced in web development using TypeScript, Java, and modern frameworks;

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: If you have an idea, a project, or simply wish to exchange experiences, please feel free to reach out. It would be a pleasure to connect with you.
